name: Cocos Development Core (Cocos Creator)
description: Cocos Creator development fundamentals for assessment, coverage, and inferred skill proposals.

subpoints.name: Node vs Component mental model
subpoints.description: What nodes are, what components are, and how they compose behavior.

subpoints.name: Component lifecycle
subpoints.description: Key lifecycle hooks (e.g., onLoad/start/update/onEnable/onDisable/onDestroy) and when to use them.

subpoints.name: TypeScript scripting basics
subpoints.description: Writing scripts/components in TS, typing, and common pitfalls.

subpoints.name: Scene & prefab workflow
subpoints.description: Scene composition, prefabs, instantiation, and overrides.

subpoints.name: Event & input handling
subpoints.description: UI events, touch/mouse/keyboard input, and event propagation basics.

subpoints.name: UI layout fundamentals
subpoints.description: Common UI layout strategies (widgets/anchors), resolution adaptation, and pitfalls.

subpoints.name: Animation basics
subpoints.description: Animation clips, timelines/state, and controlling animation from scripts.

subpoints.name: Physics & collision
subpoints.description: Collider/rigidbody basics, trigger vs collision, layers, and stability.

subpoints.name: Coordinate space & camera
subpoints.description: World/local/screen coordinates and common conversions for UI/gameplay.

subpoints.name: Asset loading & resource lifecycle
subpoints.description: Loading assets, caching, releasing/unloading, and avoiding memory leaks.

subpoints.name: Asset bundles (basic)
subpoints.description: Why/when to use bundles, loading strategy, and dependency considerations.

subpoints.name: Rendering performance levers
subpoints.description: Draw calls, batching, overdraw (especially UI), and practical mitigation.

subpoints.name: Update performance levers
subpoints.description: Avoid per-frame allocations, reduce node/component counts, and optimize hot paths.

subpoints.name: Profiling workflow
subpoints.description: How to profile, interpret CPU/GPU bottlenecks, and verify improvements.

subpoints.name: Build & release basics
subpoints.description: Build targets, common release issues, and minimal sanity checks.

subpoints.name: Debug strategy
subpoints.description: Repro steps, instrumentation, hypothesis-driven debugging for engine/game issues.
